name: Tomato Dill Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil and butter in a large pan.
2. Add onion and garlic and cook slowly without browning.
3. Chop tomatoes and add to the pan when onions are transparent.
4. Cook quickly for 5-6 minutes, stirring constantly.
5. Stir in flour and tomato paste until smooth.
6. Gradually add broth, simmering for 5-10 minutes.
7. Puree the soup.
8. Add cream, salt, pepper, and stir in dill.
